title: Hide suggestions in Text column
excerpt: Is there a way to hide the suggestions when typing in a Text column? These suggestions are from other rows that were already filled. It’s sort of acting like a drop down column.

posts.author: Hashmith (Hashmith)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to hide the suggestions when typing in a Text column? These suggestions are from other rows that were already filled. It’s sort of acting like a drop down column.

posts.author: lisamacrob (Lisa)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you find a way to fix this? I’m in the same position and want the suggested options to stop but can’t find a way to turn them off.
